nl_query: What is the average final honorarium amount per board coordinator?
failed_sql: SELECT fc.name AS coordinator_name, AVG(hs.final_amount) AS avg_honorarium FROM board_coordinator bc JOIN faculty_cache fc ON fc.id = bc.faculty_cache_id JOIN honorarium_summary hs ON hs.faculty_cache_id = fc.id AND hs.board_id = bc.board_id AND hs.role_in_board = 'BOARD_COORDINATOR' AND hs.approval_status IN ('APPROVED', 'EXPORTED') WHERE bc.effective_from <= CURRENT_DATE AND (bc.effective_to IS NULL OR bc.effective_to >= CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY fc.name ORDER BY avg_honorarium DESC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Column validation failed: board_coordinator does NOT have name. Join to faculty_cache: faculty_cache fc ON fc.id = bc.faculty_cache_id, then use fc.name.
